summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Resume Formatter features: Match Score and Resume Rewriter. Both features are fully functional after fixing LLM model configuration. Google OAuth authentication works correctly, redirecting to Emergent OAuth.

fixed_issues.issue: LLM model 'gpt-5.2' not accessible with current API key
fixed_issues.fix: Changed to 'claude-sonnet-4-5' model which is supported

passed_tests: Google OAuth redirects to Emergent OAuth provider (https://demobackend.emergentagent.com/auth/v1/env/oauth/authorize)
Match Score page loads at /match-score (protected route)
Match Score API returns proper score breakdown (keywords_score, alignment_score, rpm_score)
Rewrite Resume API returns rewritten resume with improvements
Load Saved dropdown works for resumes in Match Score page
Load Saved dropdown works for JDs in Match Score page
Resume and JD CRUD operations work correctly
Sidebar navigation shows Match Score and Resume Rewriter links
Match Score displays Present Keywords (green) and Missing Keywords (red)
critical_code_review_comments: The original code used 'gpt-5.2' model which was not accessible - this has been fixed by switching to 'claude-sonnet-4-5'

test_credentials.note: Multiple test users created during testing with pattern: uitest_*, matchscore_test_*, rewriter_test_*, loadsaved_test_*

seed_data_creation: Test users and test data created via pytest and Playwright UI tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features (Match Score and Resume Rewriter) fully tested and working. LLM model changed from gpt-5.2 to claude-sonnet-4-5 due to API key restrictions. Google OAuth working with Emergent Auth. All backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py
